_comment: Recurring daytime habit nudges. Each habit: name (unique id, also used for its state key), title (push title), tag (ntfy emoji tag), hours (UTC hours to fire; a slot fires on the first run AT or AFTER its hour, so hours on the every-3-hours cron grid 0/3/6/9/12/15/18/21 fire on time and off-grid hours fire up to ~3h late on the next run; 12/15/18/21 == 08:00/11:00/14:00/17:00 in the Dominican Republic, UTC-4), messages (rotated per slot for variety), and optional enabled (default true). At most one push per slot per day, deduped in state. Adding a nudge is just a new entry here - no code change. Edit this file directly on github.com.

habits.name: water
habits.title: Drink water
messages: Time for a glass of water. Stay hydrated!
Hydration check: grab some water before you carry on.
Quick reminder to drink some water.
Keep a glass of water within reach.
Sip some water - your body will thank you.
Pause for a moment and have a drink of water.
Water break! A few sips now keeps you sharp.

habits.name: stand
habits.title: Stand up & move
messages: Stand up and stretch for a minute.
Time to move - a short walk resets your focus.
Get up, roll your shoulders, take a few steps.
Been sitting a while? Stand and reset your posture.

habits.name: eyes
habits.title: Rest your eyes
messages: Give your eyes a short break from the screen.
Blink, look into the distance, relax your eyes.
